steps.title: Keep subject and verb together
steps.content: The blank forms the subject of compares. The name Wakako Yamauchi identifies which pioneering playwright is meant, so it is necessary information and should not be set off with commas.

steps.title: Reject comma interruptions
steps.content: Choice A uses commas around the name and leaves a comma before compares. Choice B wrongly places a comma after playwright. Choice C avoids the first comma but still separates the subject from its verb. The answer is D.
